# Rootss Digital

> Bilingual local SEO and digital marketing agency in Visalia, CA. Founded by Sandra Pablo. Serving small, family-owned, immigrant-owned, and Latino-owned businesses in Tulare County and the Central Valley. Services available in English and Spanish.

## What We Do

Rootss Digital helps local businesses in Visalia, CA and Tulare County get found on Google, Google Maps, and AI-powered search tools like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Siri. We specialize in Google Business Profile optimization, local SEO, and bilingual content for the Central Valley Latino business community.

## Services

- Free 15-minute discovery call (no obligation)
- Google Business Profile Audit ($97 one-time)
- 1:1 Strategy Session ($150/hour)
- GBP 101 Workshop ($97/seat)
- Starter Monthly Package ($397/month): GBP management, 4 posts/month, review monitoring, directory accuracy, monthly report
- Growth Monthly Package ($597/month): Everything in Starter plus 8 Instagram posts/month in English and Spanish
- Visibility Pro Monthly Package ($897/month): Everything in Growth plus TikTok/Reels scripts, competitor tracking, bi-weekly calls

## Who We Serve

Small and family-owned businesses in Visalia, Tulare, Fresno, Hanford, Porterville, Dinuba, Exeter, Lindsay, Farmersville, and surrounding Central Valley communities. Bilingual services for English and Spanish-speaking business owners.

## About Sandra Pablo

Sandra Pablo is the founder of Rootss Digital. She is a bilingual digital marketing professional based in Visalia, CA with expertise in local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). She specializes in helping Latino and immigrant-owned small businesses compete online in the Central Valley.

- Founded: 2024
- Languages: English and Spanish (bilingual)
- Service area: Visalia CA, Tulare County, Kings County, Central Valley California
- Specialty: Google Business Profile optimization for local businesses
- Free offering: 15-minute discovery call with no obligation
- Tagline: Get found. Get chosen. Stay rooted.
